creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
I've made a new ports for Japanized expect.
It can deal Japanise text in glob style text matching(But not support
regular expression...;-<)
It's based on ${PORTSDIR}/lang/expect.
But jp-expect does no conflict to it.
I've change bin/lib/script names.

Fix: 

I've put it to:
ftp://ports.jp.freebsd.org/pub/incoming/ports-jp/japanese/jp-expect-970311.tar.gz

Thanks.
